lineItems.description: Program Lead (0.35 FTE) — chapter strategy, event planning, mentorship coordination, community management
Program Assistant (0.15 FTE) — administrative support, event logistics, communications
Workshop facilitator fees — 8 technical and professional development workshops per year
lineItems.notes: $750 per facilitator for 8 workshops; topics include coding, leadership, salary negotiation, personal branding

lineItems.description: Mentorship program — mentor matching, mentor training, mentorship resources
lineItems.notes: 20 mentor-mentee pairs; includes mentor onboarding materials and quarterly mentor appreciation

lineItems.description: Networking events — quarterly mixers and community gatherings (4 per year)
lineItems.notes: $1,000 per event for venue, food, and beverages

lineItems.description: Annual retreat or summit — full-day women's leadership and tech summit
lineItems.notes: Venue, catering, speaker honoraria, and materials for signature annual event

lineItems.description: Professional development stipends — conference tickets, course enrollments, certifications
lineItems.notes: $150 stipend for up to 20 active members to attend external events or courses

lineItems.description: Guest speaker honoraria — monthly speaker series with women in tech leadership
lineItems.notes: $200 per speaker for 12 monthly speaker events

lineItems.description: Software and tools — Slack channels, Notion workspace, Zoom, design tools
lineItems.notes: Allocated portion of organizational subscriptions for chapter use

lineItems.description: Chapter marketing and recruitment — social media campaigns, branded content, outreach
lineItems.notes: Targeted outreach to Black women in tech in NYC; Instagram and LinkedIn focused

lineItems.description: Branded materials — chapter-specific swag, event materials, welcome kits
lineItems.notes: Welcome kits for new members, branded items for events

lineItems.description: Administrative overhead — accounting, insurance allocation, reporting
lineItems.notes: General program administration and organizational overhead
